Step 2 of 5
When is your race?
The app will calculate your plan length and structure automatically.
Step 3 of 5
Your current fitness
Enter a recent race or training run. The app uses this to calculate your training paces.
Step 4 of 5
When do you run?
Select your preferred days. Tap to assign each run type. UESCA guidelines: never schedule quality the day before your long run.

Step 5 of 5
Your training paces
Calculated from your recent result. You can adjust any of these - they'll be used throughout your plan.
You can adjust paces at any time from the Paces screen. The app will also suggest adjustments based on your logged sessions.
Training Schedule
Training Pace Targets
Paces are in min:sec per km. Edit any value and tap Save. Changes apply to all future sessions in your plan.
Auto-adjust: After logging a session, the app compares your actual pace to the target. If you consistently beat the target, it suggests increasing pace. If you're missing it, it suggests reducing.
